zustand.description: Zustand lightweight client state container and vanilla store APIs.

key_value_store.description: Zustand store creation and Immer middleware patterns.

store_definition.description: Zustand store creation using create/createStore APIs.
store_definition.notes: Validator should confirm the callee is imported from `zustand` or `zustand/vanilla` (or an alias bound to those modules). Generic calls like `create(...)` or `api.createStore(...)` should be rejected unless import provenance clearly resolves to Zustand.

immer_store.description: Zustand store mutators configured with Immer middleware.
immer_store.notes: Validator should confirm the `immer` call is imported from `zustand/middleware/immer` (or a bound alias) and used in Zustand store composition. Reject unrelated Immer helpers without matching import provenance.
